rounds.prompt: How many times longer is the Trans-Siberian Railway than the London Underground?
rounds.fact: The London Underground is ~402 km of track; the Trans-Siberian Railway is ~9,289 km — about 23× longer (total track vs route).

rounds.prompt: How many times heavier is a fully loaded container ship than the Eiffel Tower?
rounds.fact: The Eiffel Tower weighs ~7,300 tonnes; a fully loaded container ship like the Evergreen Ever Ace weighs ~440,000 tonnes — 60× heavier.

rounds.prompt: How many times faster is the Shinkansen than a horse at full gallop?
rounds.fact: A horse gallops at ~65 km/h; the Shinkansen runs at ~300 km/h — about 4.6× faster.

rounds.prompt: How many times longer is a modern aircraft carrier than the Wright Brothers' first flight?
rounds.fact: The Wright Brothers' first flight was 37 metres; the USS Gerald Ford is 337 m long — over 9× longer. The first plane could have taken off and landed on the flight deck.

rounds.prompt: How many times taller is the Burj Khalifa than the wingspan of a Boeing 747?
rounds.fact: A 747's wingspan is ~64 m; the Burj Khalifa is 828 m tall — about 13× taller than the plane is wide.
